title: Northwind CRM — Close more deals with less busywork.
targetAudience: RevOps leaders at 50–500 person B2B SaaS companies

scenes.visualInstruction: Product wordmark "Northwind CRM" on a clean dark canvas, subtle accent underline.
scenes.voiceoverText: Close more deals with less busywork.

scenes.visualInstruction: Short problem statement, single line, generous whitespace.
scenes.voiceoverText: Most teams lose time switching tabs to find what actually needs attention.

scenes.visualInstruction: Show "open dashboard" screen (Dashboard). Slow push toward the primary action.
scenes.voiceoverText: Here you open dashboard — new customer is one click away.

scenes.visualInstruction: Show "create customer" screen (New customer). Gentle motion across the view.
scenes.voiceoverText: Here you create customer — save is one click away.

scenes.visualInstruction: Show "show analytics" screen (Analytics). Gentle motion across the view.
scenes.voiceoverText: Here you show analytics — export is one click away.

scenes.visualInstruction: Three compact outcome chips: faster, clearer, fewer tabs.
scenes.voiceoverText: The result: your team sees priorities first, acts faster, and skips the busywork.
See it on your own data — start at northwind.example.com.
